name: Perplexity

dataUsage.details: No API-specific data policy found. Values set conservatively based on absence of documentation — verify directly before processing personal data.

notes: GDPR posture materially undocumented. No DPA, no sub-processor list, no certifications found. API offers search-augmented LLM inference with real-time web grounding. EU organisations should conduct independent due diligence before using this API to process personal data. trainsOnCustomerData and optOutAvailable values are conservative defaults pending policy verification.
